Interface ISynchronizeParameters4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters for synchronizing items in a mosaic dataset.

[Guid("273E8947-7166-4388-B024-7DA20FCD7E77")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISynchronizeParameters4 : ISynchronizeParameters3, ISynchronizeParameters2, ISynchronizeParameters
